text:
Hello!

FreeBSD 11.0-RELEASE 

Something must have been bad changed on the bootloader.

can't load 'kernel'

ls  says: "can't open '/' .... "

after a manuell entering "lsdev" on prompt
boot will work.

i need now evertime the keyboard.
Same hardware sind FreeBSD 8.0


bootdrive is ada0 with mbr and slices. NO geli.

Please fix.
